title: Codex Final Judge Contract
summary: Final adversarial review over the assembled result that may approve or reroute work to an earlier stage, but cannot change methodology or overrule hard rules.
hard_checks: Codex may only approve or reroute to a prior stage; it may not invent a new stage or silently waive hard rules.
Codex may not promote an exception candidate into ranked output.
Codex may not override a no-catalyst rejection.
